calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-04-2023 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court orders the case dismissed pursuant to Government Code 68608(b). The court finds no good cause or substantial justification for failure to comply with the previous court orders. A less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Judge: Anne-Christine Massullo; Clerk: S. Le; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-02-2023 Continued To May-02-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Self-represented plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to May 2, 2023 at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: Anne-Christine Massullo; Clerk: S. Le; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-22-2022 Continued To Jan-31-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Self represented plaintiff is sanction $400.00. The OSC is continued to Jan-31-2023. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; Clerk: JLee; Proceedings not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-01-2022 Set For Order To Show Cause On Nov-01-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-24-2022 Continued To Sep-14-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Mar-08-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Sawsan Mansour, Esq. (310.887.1818; ssm@bhattorneys.com) of BD&J PC, Moving Party.
No other appearances.

Hearing is held (as fully reported in the reporter's notes). The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD for PLAINTIFF MELVIN WASHINGTON is GRANTED.

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)
